title: Federation panel + Settings drawer + Setup wizard
description: Federation: peer cards, last-seen, capabilities. Settings drawer (Q1): sections General/tmux/Terminal/Summaries/Federation/Retention/Refresh. Setup wizard: multi-step modal for first-launch (Q4).

context.text: Implemented dashboard federation peer panel, settings sidecar GET/PATCH + drawer, and first-launch setup wizard. Verified with npm build, full Jest (102 suites, 2468 passed, 5 skipped), dashboard typecheck, npm audit, Swift build, dashboard Playwright E2E, screenshot review in ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-014-settings-drawer-desktop.png, T-DASH-014-settings-drawer-mobile.png, and T-DASH-014-setup-wizard-mobile.png. Commit a525042 pushed to main.
